hooks.command: bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); echo "Current branch: $BRANCH"; if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "develop" ]; then echo ""; echo "⚠️  WARNING: You are on the $BRANCH branch."; echo "For parallel development, consider using git worktree:"; echo "  git worktree add ../$(basename $PWD)-<task-name> -b <branch-name>"; echo ""; fi'
bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".session_id" | cut -c1-5); curl -s -d "Claude Code [${SID}]: Completed🚀" ntfy.sh/chapple-claude-kmy4b7lnj927 > /dev/null 2>&1 &'
bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".session_id" | cut -c1-5); curl -s -d "Claude Code [${SID}]: Question❓" ntfy.sh/chapple-claude-kmy4b7lnj927 > /dev/null 2>&1 &'

bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); INPUT=$(cat); if ! command -v jq &>/dev/null; then if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "git"; then echo "❌ ERROR: git commands blocked (jq not installed for safety check)." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0; fi; CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+(push|commit)"; then if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "develop" ]; then echo "❌ ERROR: git push/commit to $BRANCH branch is blocked." >&2; echo "Please use a feature branch or git worktree for development." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi'
